rationale: Fingerprint matches the devcontainer-features variant `e => { let t = JSON.parse(e); return Object.keys(t.features||{}).map(...)}`. Feed `"{}"`: `JSON.parse("{}").features` is undefined, `undefined || {}` = `{}`, `Object.keys({}) = []`, `.map(...) = []`. Rust `split_lines+filter_empty+json_extract(sentinel)` also yields `[]`. Both empty — contract holds.
